descriptors.e: profits go to mental health nonprofits
aims to foster connection through wear

factual_points: Blake Mycoskie launched ENOUGH, a mental health brand
ENOUGH donates 100% of profits to nonprofits
Nonprofits include NAMI, Born this Way Foundation
Brand uses green color for mental health awareness
Bracelets serve as daily reminders of 'enoughness'
Brand aims to connect purpose with design
caution_flags: Source may frame mental health positively, biasing tone
Focus on branding may overshadow individual stories
Limited detail on actual mental health impact
title: TOMS FOUNDER, BLAKE MYCOSKIE, LAUNCHES ENOUGH, A MENTAL-HEALTH FOCUSED BRAND GIVING 100% OF PROCEEDS TO NONPROFIT PARTNERS
